location.label: Location
location.description: Location for which to display time.

rotationSpeed.label: Rotation Speed
rotationSpeed.description: Amount of seconds each score is displayed.

teamsOptions.label: Teams Per View
teamsOptions.description: How many teams it should show at once.

displayTop.label: Top Display
displayTop.description: A toggle of what to display on the top shelf.

displayTimeColor.label: Top Display Color
displayTimeColor.description: Select which color you want the top display to be.

location.label: Location
location.description: Location for which to display time

dialect.label: Language
dialect.description: Language in which to display time

location.label: Location
location.description: Location for the display of the weather.

showthreeday.label: Show Three Day Forecast
showthreeday.description: Toggle between three day and single day display.

force_1x_images.label: Force 1x Images
force_1x_images.description: The two-day forecast images have been upscaled to 2x. Enable this if you prefer the crispier look of the 1x images.

apiKey.label: AccuWeather API Key
apiKey.description: API key for AccuWeather data access

locationKey.label: AccuWeather Location Key
locationKey.description: Location key for AccuWeather data access

location.label: Location
location.description: Location for which to display time

articlecount.label: Article Count
articlecount.description: Select number of articles to display

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.description: Your Todoist API token. Find it in Todoist Settings > Integrations > Developer.

show.label: Show When No Tasks
show.description: Show this app when there are no tasks.

origin_label.label: Origin label
origin_label.description: Optional, if you don't provide a label we'll use the address instead.

destination_label.label: Destination label
destination_label.description: Optional, if you don't provide a label we'll use the address instead.

avoid_highways.label: Avoid highways
avoid_highways.description: Limited access roads will be deprioritized

avoid_bandt.label: Avoid bridges & tunnels
avoid_bandt.description: Bridges and tunnels will be avoided if possible

avoid_hills.label: Avoid hilly routes
avoid_hills.description: Routing will prefer flat routes to hilly ones.

prefer_bike_lanes.label: Bike-friendly roads
prefer_bike_lanes.description: Routes will prioritize roads with bike lanes.

bing_auth.label: Bing Maps API Key
bing_auth.description: Enter your API Key from bingmapsportal.com/Application. Bringing your own key means all Tidbyt owners can use this app!

mq_auth.label: MapQuest API Consumer Key
mq_auth.description: Enter your free or paid API Key from mapquestapi.com. Bringing your own key means all Tidbyt owners can use this app!

ors_auth.label: OpenRouteService Free API Key
ors_auth.description: Enter your free API Key from openrouteservice.org. Bringing your own key means all Tidbyt owners can use this app!

followed_country.label: Country to Follow
followed_country.description: Choose the country you want to track.

hide_scores.label: Hide Scores
hide_scores.description: Hide match scores to avoid spoilers.

is_us_date_format.label: US Date Format
is_us_date_format.description: Display dates as MM/DD instead of DD/MM.

name_entity.label: Display Name
name_entity.description: Entity name for vehicle display name

plugged_in_entity.label: Plugged In
plugged_in_entity.description: Entity name for plugged in status

car_tint.label: Car Color
car_tint.description: The color of the car to display. Light/White colors will use the default white car.

color_10.label: Color at 10%
color_10.description: Battery color when at 10% or below

color_80.label: Color at 80%
color_80.description: Battery color when at 80% and above

show_currency_abbriviation.label: Show currency abbriviation?
show_currency_abbriviation.description: Enable this option to show the currency abbriviation.

location.label: Location
location.description: Location for which to display prayer times

method.label: Prayer Calculation Method
method.description: A prayer times calculation method. Methods identify various schools of thought about how to compute the timings. If not specified, it defaults to Umm Al-Qura University, Makkah

feedchoice.label: Choose your favourite feed
feedchoice.description: Get news that’s tailored to you.

fontsize.label: Change the text size
fontsize.description: Prevent long words being cut off.
